title: Workdoc tables should allow you to highlight & copy or format them all at once
excerpt: Each line in a table must be highlighted and formatted/copied one at a time. We need the ability to select multiple rows or cells at a time to format or copy.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: Each line in a table must be highlighted and formatted/copied one at a time. We need the ability to select multiple rows or cells at a time to format or copy.
